title: boehmeria sanguinea var. glabrata
intro: Boehmeria sanguinea var. glabrata, also known as the smooth nettle tree or smooth Boehmeria, is a plant species in the nettle family (Urticaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria sanguinea var. glabrata are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Boehmeria sanguinea var. glabrata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in traditional medicine.
